pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting setup_task.sh, which launches sumo-gui using '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta/run.sumocfg'. Confirmed via SUMO documentation (sumo.dlr.de/docs/Data/Scenarios.html) that Bologna Acosta is a real-world scenario.
Verified by reading the task.json description, which explicitly instructs the user to run 'scrot /home/ga/SUMO_Output/speed_coloring.png'.

privileged_info_summary: The task executes the real-world 'Bologna Acosta' SUMO scenario. The environment setup copies this scenario to '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_acosta' and automatically loads 'run.sumocfg' in sumo-gui. To complete the task, a screenshot showing speed-colored vehicles must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/speed_coloring.png'.
